message.content:
You are doing a pure .adoc cosmetic edit on ONE file. No code, no behavior change, no semantic change. Mechanical apply only.

**File:** `/Users/bhyslop/projects/rbm_alpha_recipemuster/Tools/rbk/vov_veiled/RBSDR-director_roster.adoc`

**Background:** Convert the opener NOTE block from inline-style (linked terms `{...}` interpolated mid-line) to line-broken style (each `{...}` linked term on its own line, matching gold-standard RBSDE/RBSDV).

**Single change — Opener NOTE (currently at L4-6):**

Current text:
```
NOTE: This operation rosters {rbtr_director} {giam_service_account_s} in the {rbtgi_depot_project} via per-SA fact-file emission.
Read-only observation: lists all SAs, filters to director-prefixed accountIds, and emits one fact per discovered SA via {buf_write_fact_multi} against the `RBCC_fact_ext_roster_director` extension constant.
Fact content is empty (presence-as-fact); stdout assertion of individual identities is retired.
```

Replace with (each `{...}` linked term on own line; backtick-wrapped `RBCC_fact_ext_roster_director` stays inline since it's a code-style reference):
```
NOTE: This operation rosters
{rbtr_director}
{giam_service_account_s}
in the
{rbtgi_depot_project}
via per-SA fact-file emission.
Read-only observation: lists all SAs, filters to director-prefixed accountIds, and emits one fact per discovered SA via
{buf_write_fact_multi}
against the `RBCC_fact_ext_roster_director` extension constant.
Fact content is empty (presence-as-fact); stdout assertion of individual identities is retired.
```

**DO NOT TOUCH:**
- The //axhob_operation header or `{rbtgo_director_roster}` ref at top
- ANY of the //axhos_step content
- The //axhoc_completion block
- Any other text in the file

**Method:**
1. Read the full file first
2. Use Edit tool to make exactly the one change above
3. Read once more and verify ONLY the opener NOTE changed
4. Report back

Report concisely: confirm the edit, note any anomaly. Keep response under 100 words.

content.content:
1	//axhob_operation
2	{rbtgo_director_roster}
3	
4	NOTE: This operation rosters {rbtr_director} {giam_service_account_s} in the {rbtgi_depot_project} via per-SA fact-file emission.
5	Read-only observation: lists all SAs, filters to director-prefixed accountIds, and emits one fact per discovered SA via {buf_write_fact_multi} against the `RBCC_fact_ext_roster_director` extension constant.
6	Fact content is empty (presence-as-fact); stdout assertion of individual identities is retired.
7	
8	//axhos_step
9	. *Authenticate as
10	{rbtr_governor}*:
11	.. Execute
12	{rbtoe_governor_authenticate}
13	.. {rbbc_store}
14	`«GOVERNOR_TOKEN»` from the resulting access token
15	
16	//axhos_step
17	. *List service accounts*:
18	.. {rbbc_call}
19	link:https://cloud.google.com/iam/docs/reference/rest/v1/projects.serviceAccounts/list[iam.projects.serviceAccounts.list] with:
20	... method: `GET`
21	... endpoint: `https://iam.googleapis.com/v1/projects/{rbtgi_depot_project}/serviceAccounts`
22	... header: `Authorization: Bearer «GOVERNOR_TOKEN»`
23	.. {rbbc_require}
24	HTTP 200 response
25	.. {rbbc_store}
26	`«ACCOUNTS»` from response `.accounts[]` array
27	
28	//axhos_step
29	. *Filter to director service accounts*:
30	.. From `«ACCOUNTS»`, retain only entries whose `.accountId` begins with the `${RBCC_role_director}-` prefix
31	.. {rbbc_store}
32	`«DIRECTOR_ACCOUNTS»` — the filtered set; per-role observation per BBAAQ contract
33	
34	//axhos_step
35	. *Emit Fact Per Discovered {rbtr_director}*:
36	.. For each entry in `«DIRECTOR_ACCOUNTS»`:
37	... {rbbc_store}
38	`«IDENTITY»` by stripping the `${RBCC_role_director}-` prefix from the entry's `accountId`
39	... {rbbc_call}
40	{buf_write_fact_multi}
41	with three positional arguments:
42	.... `<file_root>`: composed as `<roster_subdir>/«IDENTITY»` (the basename root for the emitted fact file)
43	.... `<ext>`: `RBCC_fact_ext_roster_director` (resolves at source time to `roster-director`)
44	.... `<value>`: `""` (empty content — presence-as-fact convention per RBS0:1081)
45	
46	//axhos_step
47	. *Report count*:
48	.. {rbbc_show}
49	total count of emitted director fact files
50	
51	//axhoc_completion
52	Successful execution rosters {rbtr_director} service accounts via per-SA fact emission — one `roster-director` fact file per discovered identity.
53	The operation is read-only; no service accounts are created or modified.
54

input.old_string:
NOTE: This operation rosters {rbtr_director} {giam_service_account_s} in the {rbtgi_depot_project} via per-SA fact-file emission.
Read-only observation: lists all SAs, filters to director-prefixed accountIds, and emits one fact per discovered SA via {buf_write_fact_multi} against the `RBCC_fact_ext_roster_director` extension constant.
Fact content is empty (presence-as-fact); stdout assertion of individual identities is retired.

content.text: Edit applied cleanly. The opener NOTE block at L4-6 now has each `{...}` linked term on its own line, matching the gold-standard RBSDE/RBSDV style. No other content was touched. No anomalies.
